title: HONG CIAH KIK LEL DING HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jerusalem khuapi sungah,
To Zeisu a lutni-in ah,
Kisin nai lo lano tungah,
Tuangin minthanna ngah,
A neipa in kham zo tuan lo,
Topa in a deih nungsang,
Paipihta e, Jerusalemlam ah.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa in a deih a leh,
Hong piaksa thuphate khempeuh,
Paipih lel hen, a minthan nading ahih leh,
I neihsa bangmah om kei,
A sumkem dingte bek i hi,
Paipih hen aw, hong ciah kik lel ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khazih sung a om u le nau,
Hih thupha hi na ngah ngei maw,
Satan in a paipihte pen,
hong ciah kik ngei nawn lo ding,
Ahih hang vanglian Topa in,
A paipih sum le paaite pen,
Hong ciah kik hi, a zah tampi tak tawh.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: I pianna khua le gam a om,
Thu-ummi khangthak lia le taang,
Tu ni-om nang na man nai hiam,
Pang ciatve ni Topa ading,
Piakkhiatna le thungetna tawh,
I sep kul hi, Topa in hong deih hi.
